ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., nfet_03v3_dss) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., nFET, pFET) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "fabrication_date" TEXT /* Date of fabrication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., in production, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_device_type FOREIGN KEY ("device_type") REFERENCES device_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter set */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "width_um" REAL /* Width of the device in micrometers */,
  "length_um" REAL /* Length of the device in micrometers */,
  "num_fingers" INTEGER /* Number of fingers in the device */,
  "corner" TEXT /* Process corner (e.g., typical, fast, slow) */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature at which the device is characterized */,
  "const_var" TEXT /* Constant variable used in the characterization */,
  "const_var_val" REAL /* Value of the constant variable */,
  "fabrication_process" TEXT /* Fabrication process used */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the devices */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the parameters were tested */,
  "test_operator" TEXT /* Name of the operator who conducted the tests */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_const_var FOREIGN KEY ("const_var") REFERENCES constant_variables ("const_var_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_temperature FOREIGN KEY ("temperature") REFERENCES temperatures ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameters_corner FOREIGN KEY ("corner") REFERENCES corners ("corner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_sweeps" (
  "sweep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sweep set */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter set */,
  "vgs_range" TEXT /* Range of Vgs values (e.g., -3.3 3.3) */,
  "vgs_step" REAL /* Step size for Vgs */,
  "vbs_range" TEXT /* Range of Vbs values (e.g., -3.3 0.0 0.825) */,
  "vbs_step" REAL /* Step size for Vbs */,
  "sweep_type" TEXT /* Type of sweep (e.g., linear, logarithmic) */,
  "sweep_duration" REAL /* Duration of the sweep */,
  "sweep_frequency" REAL /* Frequency at which the sweep was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sweep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_sweeps_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES device_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the device type (e.g., nFET, pFET) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the device type */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the device (e.g., silicon, gallium arsenide) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corners" (
  "corner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each process corner */,
  "corner_name" TEXT /* Name of the process corner (e.g., typical, fast, slow) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the process corner */,
  "voltage_level" REAL /* Voltage level associated with the process corner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature value in degrees Celsius */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level at which the device was characterized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constant_variables" (
  "const_var_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constant variable */,
  "const_var_name" TEXT /* Name of the constant variable (e.g., vds) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the constant variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the constant variable (e.g., volts, amperes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("const_var_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the device */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "sim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter set */,
  "sim_date" TEXT /* Date of the simulation */,
  "sim_tool" TEXT /* Simulation tool used */,
  "sim_results" TEXT /* Results of the simulation (e.g., file path) */,
  "simulation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the simulation */,
  "simulation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES device_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_rigs" (
  "rig_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test rig */,
  "rig_name" TEXT /* Name of the test rig */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test rig */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the test rig */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the test rig */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the test rig */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rig_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test session */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "rig_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test rig used */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the test session */,
  "test_operator" TEXT /* Name of the test operator */,
  "test_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the test session */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the test session */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted (e.g., lab, field) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_rig_id FOREIGN KEY ("rig_id") REFERENCES test_rigs ("rig_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_sessions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test data point */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test session */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter set */,
  "vgs" REAL /* Gate-to-source voltage (Vgs) */,
  "vds" REAL /* Drain-to-source voltage (Vds) */,
  "vbs" REAL /* Bulk-to-source voltage (Vbs) */,
  "current" REAL /* Current measurement */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage measurement */,
  "temperature" INTEGER /* Temperature during the test */,
  "test_duration" REAL /* Duration of the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted (e.g., lab, field) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES test_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_data_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES device_parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., datasheet, simulation results) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_files_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., technical, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_comments_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each upload event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the data */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date of the upload */,
  "upload_type" TEXT /* Type of the upload (e.g., parameter set, test data) */,
  "upload_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the uploaded data */,
  "upload_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the upload */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_uploads_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_uploads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval event */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the data */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of the approval */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the approval */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* Reason for rejection if the approval status is 'rejected' */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_approvals_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_approvals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the issue */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date of the issue */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date of the resolution */,
  "resolution_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the resolution */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_issues_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_issues_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
